Operations: Turf Coverage Input

Operations Hub Pipeline Shifts Turf Ramp Coverage ledger only. Turf attempts are not production source-of-truth.

Turf Event Entry

Track precinct/turf coverage and touches. Optional link to a shift for dedupe transparency.

Coverage Readout

Track precinct touch count and coverage workload over time.
